actionGroups.description: Read-only tools for investigating production incidents. Reads CloudWatch metrics, logs, ECS service health, and deployment history.

functions.name: get_service_health
functions.description: Current snapshot of checkout-service: status, running version, task count, and alarm state.

functions.name: get_metrics
functions.description: Get service metrics (CPU, memory, error count) over a recent window with baseline comparison.

minutes_back.description: Window size in minutes, e.g. 15 or 30

alarm_time.description: ISO timestamp of the alarm. If provided, metrics are centered around this time instead of now.

functions.name: get_error_logs
functions.description: Query application error logs over a recent time window. Returns error patterns, timeline, and sample messages.

minutes_back.description: How many minutes of logs to query

alarm_time.description: ISO timestamp of the alarm. If provided, log window is centered around the alarm time.

functions.name: get_recent_deploys
functions.description: List recent deployments to checkout-service, newest first, including task definition revisions.
